mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.real_name AS realName, u.email, u.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, u.nickname, u.is_active AS isActive FROM dbo.users u JOIN dbo.roles r ON u.role_id = r.role_id ORDER BY u.role_id, u.user_id
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.users SET role_id = #{roleId}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.course_id AS courseId, c.course_name AS courseName, c.course_code AS courseCode, c.semester, u.real_name AS teacherName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.course_enrollments ce WHERE ce.course_id = c.course_id) AS studentCount FROM dbo.courses c JOIN dbo.users u ON c.teacher_id = u.user_id ORDER BY c.course_id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dbo.appeals WHERE submission_id IN (SELECT submission_id FROM dbo.submissions WHERE assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM dbo.assignments WHERE course_id = #{id}))

DELETE FROM dbo.review_scores WHERE review_id IN (SELECT r.review_id FROM dbo.reviews r JOIN dbo.peer_review_assignments pra ON r.pra_id = pra.pra_id WHERE pra.assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM dbo.assignments WHERE course_id = #{id}))
DELETE FROM dbo.reviews WHERE pra_id IN (SELECT pra_id FROM dbo.peer_review_assignments WHERE assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM dbo.assignments WHERE course_id = #{id}))
DELETE FROM dbo.peer_review_assignments WHERE assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM dbo.assignments WHERE course_id = #{id})
DELETE FROM dbo.rubric_items WHERE rubric_id IN (SELECT rubric_id FROM dbo.rubrics WHERE assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM dbo.assignments WHERE course_id = #{id}))
DELETE FROM dbo.rubrics WHERE assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM dbo.assignments WHERE course_id = #{id})
DELETE FROM dbo.submissions WHERE assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM dbo.assignments WHERE course_id = #{id})
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.users) AS userCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.users WHERE role_id=4) AS studentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.users WHERE role_id=2) AS teacherCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.courses) AS courseCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.assignments) AS assignmentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.submissions) AS submissionCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.reviews WHERE status='submitted') AS reviewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.appeals WHERE status='pending') AS pendingAppeals
